invalidation.zh: 资金费率Z-Score回升至-50%以上（空头压力缓解）或价格跌破3000关键心理支撑。
invalidation.en: Funding rate Z-Score recovers above -50% (short pressure eases) or price breaks below 3000 key psychological support.

invalidation.zh: 资金费率Z-Score回升至-50%以上（空头压力缓解）或价格跌破125（基于ATR和关键支撑）。
invalidation.en: Funding rate Z-Score recovers above -50% (short pressure eases) or price breaks below 125 (based on ATR and key support).

invalidation.zh: 资金费率Z-Score回升至-50%以上（空头压力缓解）或价格跌破0.13（基于ATR $0.0022和整数支撑）。
invalidation.en: Funding rate Z-Score recovers above -50% (short pressure eases) or price breaks below 0.13 (based on ATR $0.0022 and round-number support).
